creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
Dean:

the patch got very mangled, but I think I reconstructed it and will send 
you my version of this in separate email.

note:
USE_APACHE= sb 22, not 2.2
NO_PACKAGE means that the binaries are restricted (I don't think that is 
what you want).
the IS_INTERACTIVE should provide same functionality, but you should 
consider not using that, and/or in scripts/template.sh should check for 
BATCH,

that way, binary packages can be build.


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
